process.title: Our Process
process.subtitle: From the heart of Asia to your wardrobe. Discover how each piece comes to life.
process.section1Text: Each piece begins its journey in small family workshops in Rajasthan, Kerala, Chiang Mai, and Bangkok. We select artisans directly, with no intermediaries.
process.section2Text: We work exclusively with natural silk, organic cotton, pure linen, and plant-derived dyes. Each material is inspected individually.
process.section3Text: Our artisans practice techniques handed down for centuries: zardozi embroidery, hand block-printing, waist-loom weaving, and batik dyeing.
process.section4Text: We pay fair prices that exceed 40% of the local standard. We fund education for our artisans' children and guarantee dignified working conditions.
process.section5Text: Each piece goes through 3 levels of inspection before packaging. We verify stitching, finishes, color, and fabric drape.
process.section6Text: We package with sustainable materials and ship to over 50 countries. Tracking is complete and shipping is insured.
